review_comment: Strong submission with all fields measured. YoY emission reductions confirmed. Approved.
Good first full ESG submission. Minor estimates noted but acceptable for baseline year.
Exemplary submission. All figures measured, strong diversity metrics, emissions declining. Approved.
Solid baseline submission. High confidence data throughout.
Scope 3 estimated pending supplier data. Review scope 2 market-based methodology. Awaiting supporting documents.
Fatality noted and corrective action plan reviewed and accepted. Approved with mandatory follow-up in 2024.
Leading ESG performer in portfolio. Renewable energy company setting benchmark. Approved.
Excellent baseline. Renewable energy focus evident across all metrics.
Air quality controls absent for second year. esg_kpis_linked_to_remuneration = No with no remediation plan. Please provide action plan and resubmit.
Approved with note: air quality controls must be addressed in 2024 submission.
Submission complete for financial services company. Scope 3 estimated - request breakdown by category.
Clean submission for debt asset class company. Low environmental footprint as expected.
Good improvement across all ESG pillars. Female leadership up to 50%. Approved.
Solid healthcare submission. Community investment strong.
Formula mismatch in GHG totals. All confidence levels Estimated. Cyber incidents rising. Must resubmit with measured data and GHG reconciliation.
Corruption case noted. Legal confirmation of resolution required before final sign-off.
Good emission reductions. Methane capture program verified against third-party report. Approved.
Agriculture sector challenges acknowledged. Good scope 3 disclosure for sector.
Submission not started. Two prior-year fatalities unresolved at review. Escalated to investment committee. Mandatory engagement required.
Two fatalities in period. Board-level ESG oversight = No is unacceptable. Resubmission required with corrective action evidence.
Tech company with strong measured data. Emissions down, diversity improving. Approved.
Good submission. Cyber incident noted and resolution confirmed.
REIT with strong NABERS improvement trajectory. Governance metrics excellent. Approved.
Clean real estate submission. Good green leasing progress.
Scope 2 and 3 estimated. Water recycled query raised (subsequently cleared). Cybersecurity policy now in place - good progress.
Approved with note: cybersecurity and ESG linked remuneration gaps to be addressed.
Education sector leader. Strong gender diversity trajectory. All figures measured. Approved.
Good submission with improving diversity metrics.
waste_diverted_from_landfill exceeds total_waste_generated. Must reconcile waste data before approval. Provide waste audit evidence.
Waste management company with good operational ESG. High TRIFR for sector - flag for 2024.
Aged care company with good social metrics. Scope 3 estimated acceptable. Approved.
Good baseline for aged care real estate asset.
Mining company showing improvement. Board ESG oversight now established - major positive. Approved with recommendation to accelerate scope 1 reduction.
Board ESG oversight = No unacceptable for mining asset. Resubmission required with governance improvement plan.
All figures estimated. Data system migration noted but not sufficient justification for full cycle. Request partial measured data for energy and employees at minimum.
Acceptable submission for F&B company. Scope 3 methodology to be formalised.
Good telecom submission. Energy efficiency improving with network virtualisation. Approved.
Solid baseline. Cyber incidents noted and investigated.
Fatality in 2024 requires mandatory board-level safety review evidence before approval can proceed. Submission quality otherwise good.
Two fatalities require comprehensive safety review evidence. Aviation sector safety performance below acceptable threshold.
